nredisstack_sync.signature: GeoSearch(RedisKey key, RedisValue member, GeoSearchShape shape, int count = -1, bool demandClosest = true, Order? order = null, GeoRadiusOptions options = GeoRadiusOptions.Default, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the set.

params.name: shape
params.description: The shape to use to bound the geo search.

params.name: count
params.description: The maximum number of results to pull back.

params.name: demandClosest
params.description: Whether to terminate the search after finding count results. Must be true of count is -1.

params.name: order
params.description: The order to sort by (defaults to unordered).

params.name: options
params.description: The search options to use.

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags for this operation.

returns.description: The results found within the shape, if any.
